data.title: Russia requires crypto miners to report income by the 20th of each month, prohibiting financial criminals from participating
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Russia has issued new regulations on cryptocurrency mining, stipulating that miners must report income before the 20th of each month, and only approved entities can operate. Those with a record of financial crimes will be prohibited from engaging in cryptocurrency mining activities. Through strict supervision and national miner registration, Russia is filtering out bad actors while providing a clear compliance path for legal miners. (Bitcoin.com) Earlier, the Russian Ministry of Energy announced plans to establish a single registration agency for cryptocurrency mining equipment, forcing all cryptocurrency mining operations to register. TASS reported that if the plan is implemented, cryptocurrency mining without equipment registered in the system will be "impossible." The plan, led by Deputy Energy Minister Yevgeny Grabchak, is part of a proposed amendment to existing mining regulations to better identify domestic mining activities, especially those held in areas where mining is not allowed.

data.title: Optimism launches a new Retro Funding plan with a reward scale of 8 million OP
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ethereum's second-layer solution Optimism announced the launch of a new Retro Funding plan with a reward scale of 8 million OP. The focus of this period is development tools (Dev Tooling). The rewards will be used to support builders who develop applications and tools on the super chain, such as compilers, libraries and debuggers. The time range of this period is from February 5 to July 31. Applications are now open. All applied projects must be open source. The rewards are expected to be distributed monthly starting from March.

data.title: BitMEX co-founder: US strategic Bitcoin reserves may have a negative impact on the industry
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes believes that the United States' strategic Bitcoin reserves may have a negative impact on the industry. He wrote in his latest blog that if the Democratic Party wins the 2028 election and decides to sell its inventory, it may be used as a political weapon or even overthrown.

data.title: Circle CEO Advocates For Programmable Digital Dollar
data.description: According to Odaily, Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire recently expressed on X that the U.S. government should adopt a programmable digital dollar and smart contracts. Allaire's statement highlights the potential benefits of integrating advanced digital financial technologies into the national currency system.

data.title: DefiLlama launches new airdrop query function, supporting SOL and EVM addresses
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the data analysis platform DefiLlama has launched an airdrop check tool. Users can view eligible airdrop projects by entering SOL or EVM addresses. The tool has been launched on DefiLlama's airdrop page, and also provides a list of token-free protocols and a collection link.

data.title: BONK will destroy 2.025 trillion BONK, equivalent to approximately $36.956 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, the Meme project BONK announced that it will destroy 2.025 trillion BONKs, worth approximately US$36.956 million.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Industry Faces Significant Losses In January 2025
data.description: According to Foresight News, the cryptocurrency industry experienced substantial financial losses in January 2025, totaling approximately $98.19 million. Data compiled by SlowMist indicates that there were 40 hacking incidents during this period, resulting in losses amounting to $87.94 million. Of this amount, $1.47 million was successfully recovered. Additionally, Scam Sniffer's monitoring identified 9,220 victims, with total losses reaching $10.25 million.

data.title: Circle CEO: The US government needs a programmable digital dollar and smart contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire said in a post on X: "The U.S. government needs programmable digital dollars and smart contracts."

data.title: OKX will officially launch BERA/USDT perpetual contract on the web, App and API, supporting 50x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, OKX will officially launch the BERA/USDT perpetual contract on the web, App and API at 22:00 (UTC+8) on February 6, 2025, supporting up to 50 times leverage, and will launch BERA's leveraged trading and simple coin earning at 12:00 noon on February 7, 2025 (UTC+8).

data.title: A whale who invested $11 million in Berachain ecosystem NFT received about 1.466 million BERA airdrops
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Berachain Ecosystem NFT Whale @Cbb0fe disclosed his BERA airdrop screenshot on X, and received a total of 1,465,932 BERA airdrops. He said that in the past two years, he has invested a total of 11 million US dollars to accumulate a large number of Berachain Ecosystem NFTs.
